name: invoicing-platform
description: Minimal single-business invoicing on Cloudflare Workers — Stripe & PayPal, PDF invoices, payment reminders. One-click deploy, no monthly fees.

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:test: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env test && wrangler deploy --env test
scripts.db:migrate:test: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env test
scripts.db:wipe:test: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env test --file scripts/wipe-data.sql
scripts.db:reset:test: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env test --file scripts/reset-env.sql

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for /admin until you configure Cloudflare Access (which disables it automatically). Pick something long.
